title: SEC Form 8-K: GlobalTech Corp — Workforce Restructuring Announcement
snippet: GlobalTech Corp files 8-K: 1,200 employees affected by strategic realignment — 800 transferring to new AI subsidiary, 400 offered voluntary separation.
content: FORM 8-K — CURRENT REPORT. Registrant: GlobalTech Corporation (NASDAQ: GTC). Date of Report: January 1, 2024. Item 2.05 — Costs Associated with Exit or Disposal Activities. GlobalTech Corporation today announced a strategic realignment of its workforce affecting approximately 1,200 employees across its Cloud Services and Enterprise Software divisions. The restructuring involves two components: (A) Transfer of approximately 800 employees to TechForward Inc., a newly formed wholly-owned subsidiary focused on AI-native enterprise solutions. These employees will retain equivalent compensation, benefits, and tenure. (B) A Voluntary Separation Program (VSP) offered to approximately 400 employees, providing 6 months base salary continuation, 12 months healthcare coverage, and outplacement assistance. No employees are being involuntarily terminated. The Company estimates one-time restructuring charges of $85 million in Q1 2024. This action is part of the Company's 'Accelerate AI' strategic initiative and is not related to financial performance. For the fiscal year ended December 31, 2023, the Company reported revenue of $14.2 billion, representing 3.1% year-over-year growth.
